transcript: How’s it goin’, man? Good, how you doin’, man?
I’m hangin’ in, hangin’ in! San Diego! [exhales] Thank you for having me.
We all just watched the movie. I think we all really enjoyed it. Em…—
D’you want me to get you any numbers. Do—do you have anything ready?
Sure! I mean, I—I’d love to some numerals from ya up 'ere! [exhales]
Yeah, it’s about time. Yeah, this is Dustin, man. How ya doin’?

Well good, man. I’m new to the area here. [blows air] I just moved in around the way from ya. I noticed you were outside a bunch last couple… days and, uh… Look, tomorrow morning, just wanna make sure you’re gonna be inside. I’m a whip master. I got a 28-foot horse whip. I’m gonna be, uh… practicing out front. I just need you outta the way if that’s alright.
I don’t need any liability, responsibility—that kinda stuff. Ya know, I’m just lookin’ out for you. Is that alright with ya?
I mean, I get this bull whip swingin’ around—looks like a propeller flyin’ through the air up 'ere! [exhales]
So as long as we’re on the same page up there, ya know what I mean?
Yeah, yeah! Um… what—what page—? What page are we on? I’m not sure…
Oh, whadda you mean by that? Well I can let ya talk to the owner o’ the house. Ya know? Does that work for you or…? [exhales]
[ Wayne Bent sample ]I am the embodiment of God.
[ Wayne Bent sample ]I am… Divinity and humanity combined.
So hopefully that straightens ya out!—
Now look, guy, I don’t wanna have to come over there and ask ya to step aside. I’m just gettin’ in with ya ahead of time.
You find it funny, do ya?
Correct, alright. Uh, well, what page are we gonna be o—? I’m—I’m just— You’re— You’re like— This is so much information. I can’t, uh… I can’t keep it all together, ya know? It’s, uh…—
It’s a big page. Um… Well, what time do you wanna meet tomorrow?
When I’m done with my whip! [exhales] I can carve out a little time for ya!—
Sure, I can! Sure, I can! Huh?—
…I got a 33-footer, and I got an Experimental 72-Foot Whip! [delay, pitch-shifted]So that’s what I’m workin’ with here. I’m packin’ whips… [exhales]—
The s—? The 72-foot whip—how long is—? Like, what—what, uh… what time—? I’m just kinda confused. That’s gonna take a long time if it’s 72 feet!
[laughing] Oh, you don’t wanna go there.
Should I go the 30-somethin’-foot whip then or…?
I’m wh—I’m whipped out right now.
It is pretty advanced. Yeah, what—? What page are we gonna be on, though? Like, you said we were— You asked if we were gonna be on the same page.
Ye— Yeah. Well, uh… what whip are we gonna be… workin’ with if…?
I just— I’m— I’m a time dude. I just need to really know what time you wanna do this.
Hey, man! I like whippets too, ya know?
I’ll be out there bright ’n early.

[delay] Woo! Aww-yeah! Ohh! Thank ya so much for bein’ here, everybody! [exhales] ’S Jason from the Twin Cities area… that we just had up 'ere! [exhales]But we’re gonna move right along, have a little fun here tonight! And… dialing a number right now. If you’ve got any further numbers for me…
Meanwhile, let’s call a liquor store here in, uh… the Hawaii area!
Yes, this is Kadota’s Liquor store.

Hi, yeah, I was gonna bring my straw up there—it’s one of those flexible straws—and just dip it into some different drinks. Dip it here, dip it there, just try out some different stuff and sample some different drinks tonight, okay?
Um… I’m not sure if that’s allowed, 'cause we’re not doing—
I’m not sure— I’m not sure what I really wanna drink tonight so I’m just gonna try some different things. Ya know, I’m gonna crack this open, crack that open, try some different stuff up—
Once I make a decision, sure. Oh, of course! Don’t be silly, ya know?
So— But I have to make a—
Alright, is there anything in particular that you’re looking for… though?
I’m not gonna make a lot of, uh, scene, I’m just gonna try some different things. I’ll just keep to myself, so just don’t bother me when I come in, alright? You’ll see me with my straw.—

Um… sir? Sir, just to warn you, we’re not doing any type of… liquor tasting. If that was to happen and my boss was here, it would be possible. What… you wanna do… I don’t think that’s gonna be possible.

Hi, yeah, I was just tellin’ the lady there, I’m gonna bring my straw in… and I’m gonna be dipping it into some different drinks tonight, sampling some different products. I’m not really sure which direction I wanna go in.
I’m just givin’ you a little heads-up, I’m gonna be samplin’ some stuff throughout the store here… tonight! Okay?
Alright! I’ll need about half an hour, forty-five minutes tonight. Alright?—
Alright, ma’am? Ma’am, you still with me? Kadota Liquor?
[laughs] Okay. Good deal! Good deal, people of San Diego! Woo! [delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]Thank you! That was The Islands! If anyone has a phone number, by gosh! Let me know.—
D’you, um… D’you prefer people that—that are familiar with Longmont, uh, or people that have no idea?
Let’s do the latter—people who do not know. If I have a choice, ya know?
Cool. Tha—tha—that’s what I, uh… figured but I didn’t wanna speak for you. Uh…—
[sample of Wayne Bent disciples cheering, shouting "Liberty!"]
I’m happy to keep on goin’, otherwise. If you’ve got anything, bring it my way!—
[sample of Wayne Bent disciple]I know that people think we’re gonna commit suicide but I can’t… comprehend it in my mind.
Let’s get into a little Mario Van Peebles! Whadda ya say up 'ere? [exhales]
[singing]Mario!I tell ya Mario!Frickin’ Mario!Frickin’ Mario!Mario! Mario! Mario!
Join me, Mario. How’s it goin’, buddy?—
How is your, uh, how is your [unclear]?—
I just moved in around the way from ya… r— uh, here recently.—
Yeah. [inhales] Hey—hey, buddy, look, I know it’s short notice. I just need to… tap into your septic tank for a little while. I’m havin’ some structural issues here at my house.
So if you see me outside, I’ll just be on your property just for a few minutes.
I—I—I understand. Well you—you—you enjoy yourself, okay?
If you see an increase in your bill or anything, ya know, o’ course I’ll make up the difference. But, I mean, I will—
Okay, well you just keep—keep your septic-poopy nice and clean, my brother. I’ll talk to you later!
You— Touch yourself.[singing]Mario!Frickin’ Mario!Mario! Mario! Mario![laughs]

[reverb] Here we go… We’re adding that person to the call! We’re adding David Koechner to the call! [exhales] We’re adding Danny McBride to the call! Ba-do! Ta-do! Ta-do! Jeremy Piven’s being added to the call! Oh, sure he is! We’re adding people left and right here tonight! Phil Anselmo—Boom! Added! Here we go… We’ve got frickin’ Bill Kelleher from Mastodon. Boom! Added to the call! Okay… We’ve got all kinds of things goin’ on here.—
[reverb] Added to the call! Here we go…
[reverb]And we can keep right on goin’ here.
[many generic TTS voicemail prompts play simultaneously until track ends]
[reverb]Oh, yeah! We got all kinds o’ stuff happening up 'ere. Big time! Big time. The Gunslinger. Sure, here we go. We got all kinds o' stuff happening here. Oh, yeah. Crazy.
Hey! We’ve got all kinds o’ people—
Hey, what’s happenin’? How’re ya doin’ tonight?

Thank you, San Diego. You guys are fantastic. You guys are fantastic. Thank you so much. You guys are fann-tastic! Faann-tastic! Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you so much! Have a fantastic time. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. Thank you, San Diego. [delay]
